title: Annotation
description: Per-file or per-module note written by the Understander agent.

path.description: Repo-relative path that this annotation describes (file or directory).

entry_point.description: True if this path is an external entry point (HTTP route, CLI, worker).

trust_boundary.description: True if untrusted data enters or crosses here.

dataflows.description: Notable dataflows, e.g. 'user input -> shell', 'request body -> db'.
